query: SELECT q.id, q.module_id, q.title_fr, q.passing_score, COUNT(qq.id) as question_count FROM quizzes q LEFT JOIN quiz_questions qq ON qq.quiz_id = q.id GROUP BY q.id ORDER BY q.module_id;
